message:
feat(cli): implement wa export and wa auth command handlers

Wire up the Export and Auth subcommand handlers in main.rs (462 lines):

Export handler:
- Dispatches to storage export methods by kind (segments, events,
  gaps, workflows, sessions, audit, reservations)
- Applies secret redaction by default, --no-redact disables with
  stderr warning
- Supports --pretty, --output, --pane-id, --since/--until, --limit

Auth handler:
- test: run automated auth flow, report AuthTestOutcome as JSON or
  human-readable summary
- status: check profile metadata and storage state health
- bootstrap: interactive one-time login with timeout

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
